query: I noticed my last invoice was higher than usual - can you help me understand why and what can be done about it?
response: I can assist with this. Could you please provide me with your customer ID or the subscription ID associated with the invoice in question? This will allow me to look up the details of your billing and subscriptions.
expected_analysis: Check billing history and recent changes in subscriptions or charges

query: My internet service seems slower than before - can you check what's happening?
response: I will need your customer ID or account details to check your subscription and any related data usage records. Please provide that information.
expected_analysis: Review the customer's current subscription plan and service status
Check for recent service incidents or network usage history
Search knowledge base for troubleshooting guidance or policies on service quality guarantees
